evals.prompt: Write the report for Task 2 — interface nodes. Save it to Report/task2.tex.
evals.expected_output: A .tex file at Report/task2.tex covering interface node identification (global/continental/national tiers), condensed into 2-3 subsections, with professional tone, no 'I'/'we', key results cited from actual outputs.

evals.prompt: Draft the latex report for Task 5. This task is about selecting 50 regional hubs using a MIP. Make sure to include the formulation.
evals.expected_output: A .tex file at Report/task5.tex with a clean MIP formulation in LaTeX math, subsections grouping candidate screening + hub selection + network linking, reflections on tradeoffs, passive/third-person voice.

evals.prompt: Write up Task 3 for the report — the demand map and clustering.
evals.expected_output: A .tex file at Report/task3.tex covering demand surface construction and SA clustering, with the SA objective/formulation shown, ~2 subsections, focused on logic and results not pipeline steps.
